# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities privately by emailing **git@lars.software**.

Please include:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- The version of the library and Go version you are using
- Any relevant workflow configuration

You can expect an initial response within 72 hours. We will coordinate a fix
and disclosure timeline with you.

Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.
